name: the generic runner hard-fails a required non-bespoke tool that is absent per the operator policy
command: printf 'x\n' > f.txt && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool ruff --file f.txt --required --json >/dev/null 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=hard-fail' e.txt && echo generic-required-absent-hard-fail 1>&2
